class.name: E3DModelManager
class.brief_description: High-level manager for loading and caching E3D model resources.
class.description: [E3DModelManager] handles the loading of MaSzyna [code].e3d[/code] models from the filesystem. It resolves paths based on the configured MaSzyna game directory and utilizes [ResourceCache] to provide efficient memory and persistent disk caching. This ensures that models are only parsed once and can be quickly reloaded from Godot's native resource format on subsequent requests.

method.name: load_model
method.description: Loads the specified model from the given [param data_path] and [param file_name]. The method first checks [ResourceCache] for a cached version (both in memory and on disk). If no cached version exists, it loads the original [code].e3d[/code] file, parses it, and automatically saves the result to the persistent cache for future use.
